title: State machine verification: Rust lichen-rpl
description:
Add state machine verification to RPL routing implementation.

RPL has complex state machines:
- DODAG state (joined, root, leaf, floating)
- Trickle timer state
- Route entry state (fresh, stale, expired)

Files: rust/lichen-rpl/src/*.rs

Use typestate for DODAG membership, runtime checks for route entries.
close_reason: Completed: added DODAG membership typestate and guarded role transitions, route entry fresh/stale/expired runtime checks, and checked Trickle timer transitions. Tests: cargo test -p lichen-rpl; cargo test -p lichen-node; cargo check -p lichen-rpl --no-default-features; cargo clippy -p lichen-rpl --all-targets -- -D warnings -A clippy::manual_is_multiple_of; git diff --check. Review pass 1: no scope creep or behavior regression; generated rust/target removed. Review pass 2: no defects found; adjacent lichen-node compatibility tests passed.
